name: post_uri
description: AT-URI of the Bluesky post (e.g. at://did:plc:xxx/app.bsky.feed.post/yyy) — primary deduplication key

name: game_date
description: Date the listener ran (partition key); posts captured on this game day

name: did
description: Bluesky DID of the post author (e.g. did:plc:dw45eosoi7tiq3cjqyxx6tvn)

name: handle
description: Bluesky handle of the post author (e.g. chrisbhaynes.bsky.social)

name: author_name
description: Human-readable display name of the beat writer (e.g. Chris Haynes)

name: post_text
description: Full text content of the Bluesky post

name: created_at
description: UTC timestamp when the post was created on Bluesky (from the post record)

name: keywords_matched
description: Comma-joined list of signal keywords found in the post text (e.g. 'questionable,GTD')

name: keyword_count
description: Number of distinct signal keywords matched in this post

name: rkey
description: Record key component of the AT-URI (the post ID within the author's repo)

name: scraped_at
description: UTC timestamp when this post was captured by the Jetstream listener

name: source_file_path
description: GCS path of the source JSON file written by the scraper
